description: Rules for how agents should report file sets in answers when describing changes to the agent-context toolchain.

groupable_families.reason: Homogeneous unittest suite; report as a family unless the change targets specific tests.
Q2 rerun pipeline; report as a family unless the change targets a specific extractor or metric tool.
Edit canonical first; the skill-side mirror is regenerated.
Edit canonical first; the skill-side mirror is regenerated.

groupable_families.report_as: skill mirror of content+quality templates (6 files; regenerated by scripts/sync-from-canonical.sh)
groupable_families.reason: Derived from templates/*.md — never edit individually.

groupable_families.report_as: skill mirror of authority/navigation templates (5 files; regenerated by scripts/sync-from-canonical.sh)
groupable_families.reason: Derived from templates/*.json — never edit individually.
Rendered figure assets used by the deck and docs; rarely change in PRs that don't touch design.
Rendered demo assets referenced by the deck and demo-script.
Reference example; report as a family unless the change targets a specific section.

groupable_families.report_as: demo pack (8 files; regenerated by re-running init against templates/)
groupable_families.reason: Demo pack used by the CI verify smoke; typically regenerated, not hand-edited.

groupable_families.report_as: CI workflows (3 files: ci · release · deploy-pages)
groupable_families.reason: Three workflows with distinct triggers; report individually only when the change is specific to one.

never_enumerate_individually.reason: Rendered from talk/cursor-meetup-may-2026.html via talk/render-pdf.sh (headless Chrome); never edit directly.
Byte-identical copy of talk/cursor-meetup-may-2026.html for GitHub Pages; refreshed via cp.
Superseded artifacts (earlier audience review, prior Marp deck source + renders). Reference only — never edit.

_rules.groupable_families: Count must be verified with git ls-files | grep ... | wc -l. Use ~ prefix for approximate counts. Must be within ±20% of actual.
_rules.never_enumerate_individually: Only for files with zero architectural value. Do not suppress files agents might need to edit.
_rules.authoritative: Files where changes originate. If in doubt, it's authoritative.
